data.body: CI signal on stack: all 3 pushed changes got LLM-Review+1 (rebar review bot). On pre-rebase PS1: 749 Verified+1 SUCCESS; 748 Verified-1 = flaky integration-tier test test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes (py3.11 only; enrich-queue prune concurrency race, recently churned by commit 9938a8aab; ZERO overlap with my overlay/prompt/docs change) -> pre-existing CI flake, remedy=recheck; 750 PS1 failures were mostly cancellations (rebase PS2 superseded PS1 mid-CI). Rebase re-triggered fresh CI on PS2 for 748/749/750 (pending). Also noted a Code-Review-1 copied on 750 to investigate. Confirmed the eval-solver dash/dot bug fix (bug 2340) would be a minimal ~3-line change in eval_solver._criterion_id (project-<name> -> project.<name> inverse).
